previousDayImpact: The Netherlands victory provided a massive 11-point boost to eight different entries, keeping the leaderboard tight at the top.
Ecuador's upset over Germany proved pivotal for Team Mack, who gained 10 points to climb the standings, while most other entries saw minimal movement from that match.
leaderboardSummary: Team Choo Choo surged five spots to take second place after a strong 20-point day fueled by the Netherlands, Japan, and USA.
Team Pahl maintains their grip on the top spot, holding steady at rank 1 with 95 total points.
Bijan Mustard climbed two positions to rank 7 following an 18-point performance.
leverageWatch: France and Norway face off today, creating a direct clash of interests between Team Godfather and Bijan Mustard on one side, and Team Megatronless and Team Jordan on the other.
Team Megatronless and Team koyn have unique leverage in their respective matches featuring New Zealand and Belgium, offering a chance to gain ground on the leaders.
